mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipment_orders ( shipment_order_code, po_id, shipment_issue_date, client_id, manager_id, shipment_status, shipment_due_date, shipment_client_name, shipment_country, shipment_manager_name, shipment_item_name, shipment_linked_documents ) SELECT #{shipmentOrderId}, po_id, CURRENT_DATE, client_id, manager_id, '출하준비', po_delivery_date, po_client_name, po_country, po_manager_name, COALESCE( CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(po_items_snapshot) > 1 THEN CONCAT( JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(po_items_snapshot, '$[0].itemName')), ' 외 ', JSON_LENGTH(po_items_snapshot) - 1, '건' ) WHEN JSON_LENGTH(po_items_snapshot) = 1 THEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(po_items_snapshot, '$[0].itemName')) ELSE '' END, '' ), CONCAT('[{"id":"', po_code, '","type":"PO","status":"', po_status, '"}]') FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_code = #{poId}
